# Partners — MEOK AI Labs | 3 Tiers: GRC, Tech, Cloud

> 3 partner tiers at MEOK AI Labs. GRC partners (30% rev share, white-label). Tech partners (MCP integration, co-marketing). Cloud partners (Vercel, AWS, Azure, GCP). CSOAI Ltd, UK 16939677.

## Overview
Partners — MEOK AI Labs | 3 Tiers: GRC, Tech, Cloud is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
